case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION VS DUARTE FELIX R.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $220.78 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE FELIX R. $220.78 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.78, DEFT TO PAY $30 ON 2/12/93, $30 ON 2/23/93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO FELIX DUARTE RETURNED, MOVED.
